hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: Passionate about building and creating web applications with the intention of learning and improving every day.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: I'm Orlando, a Full-Stack developer focused on building complete and scalable web applications. With React and Node.js as the pillars of my stack, I've built personal projects you can find on my GitHub. I'm currently looking for an opportunity to keep growing, contribute from day one, and be part of a team to learn with.
